sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Rocket Lab Stock (RKLB) Drops After Holiday Trading: After‑Hours Update, $816M Space Force Deal, Analyst Targets, and What to Watch Monday
feed.summary: Rocket Lab stock (RKLB) experienced a significant drop after holiday trading, closing down 8.46% in regular session. This decline occurred despite a recent $816 million prime contract award from the U.S. Space Development Agency, which positions Rocket Lab as a key integrated space systems supplier. Analysts remain largely constructive, but the stock's recent surge has led to profit-taking and re-evaluation of its valuation and execution timeline, especially concerning its Neutron rocket development.
